subject: [CPS] Set postgres replica strategy
commit_message:
[CPS] Set postgres replica strategy

Strategy is set to Recreate instead of using default RollingUpdate

Issue-ID: CPS-894
Change-Id: Ia5a5f54512baa6445a161c43075f0c29679691d0
Signed-off-by: Bruno Sakoto <bruno.sakoto@bell.ca>
(cherry picked from commit 6b41d876e5e0358542bd07b207973494b0f68b7f)

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

Not sure why but dcaemod keeps failing. Maybe check with Vijay

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1
> 
> Not sure why but dcaemod keeps failing. Maybe check with Vijay

There's something very strange going on here.  The dcaemod helm deploy operation is failing because of the Ingress API version (v1beta1).  This was fixed in March with 127444: [COMMON] Update Ingress API | https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/127444.   I'm not sure how this was undone... looking into a bit more.

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 5:
> 
> > Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > Not sure why but dcaemod keeps failing. Maybe check with Vijay
> 
> There's something very strange going on here.  The dcaemod helm deploy operation is failing because of the Ingress API version (v1beta1).  This was fixed in March with 127444: [COMMON] Update Ingress API | https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/127444.   I'm not sure how this was undone... looking into a bit more.

I suspect this just needs a rebase.  The patch is using an old version of the common charts.

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 5:
> 
> > Patch Set 5:
> > 
> > > Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1
> > > 
> > > Not sure why but dcaemod keeps failing. Maybe check with Vijay
> > 
> > There's something very strange going on here.  The dcaemod helm deploy operation is failing because of the Ingress API version (v1beta1).  This was fixed in March with 127444: [COMMON] Update Ingress API | https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/127444.   I'm not sure how this was undone... looking into a bit more.
> 
> I suspect this just needs a rebase.  The patch is using an old version of the common charts.

OK, this is on the Istanbul branch.  Gating is running on Kubernetes 1.22, but Istanbul doesn't support 1.22.  Specifically, Istanbul will break on 1.22 when an Ingress is used, and dcaemod always uses an Ingress, regardless of the global setting.

Patch Set 5:

> Patch Set 5:
> 
> > Patch Set 5:
> >

> > > > Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1
> > > > 
> > > > Not sure why but dcaemod keeps failing. Maybe check with Vijay
> > > 
> > > There's something very strange going on here.  The dcaemod helm deploy operation is failing because of the Ingress API version (v1beta1).  This was fixed in March with 127444: [COMMON] Update Ingress API | https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/127444.   I'm not sure how this was undone... looking into a bit more.
> > 
> > I suspect this just needs a rebase.  The patch is using an old version of the common charts.
> 
> OK, this is on the Istanbul branch.  Gating is running on Kubernetes 1.22, but Istanbul doesn't support 1.22.  Specifically, Istanbul will break on 1.22 when an Ingress is used, and dcaemod always uses an Ingress, regardless of the global setting.

So how do we progress? Can we ignore dcaemod here?
